Meeting: Platform Team Weekly Sync
Date: 2026-03-17
Attendees: Alice, Bob, Carol

Action items from last week reviewed. All three items closed.

Agenda:
- Sprint retrospective discussion
- Action items: update deployment runbook, schedule architecture review
- Decisions: adopt feature-flag rollout strategy for next release
- Follow-up required on metrics dashboard timeline

Discussion: team raised concern about test coverage gaps in the ingestion layer.
Action item: Bob will open tickets to address coverage before next sprint.

Meeting adjourned.
